critical_deadline.label: Trump ultimatum
critical_deadline.description: US deadline for Iran to reopen Hormuz or face infrastructure strikes

transit_flow.notes: Hormuz effectively closed to non-Iranian commercial traffic. JMIC reports ~4 transits/day vs 138 baseline. Iran operates selective tolled passage regime.
transit_flow.reasoning: Score is effectively certain at maximum (broken) - no meaningful transit recovery observed. Uncertainty is in how long this persists, not the current state.

attack_tempo.notes: US aircraft shot down (first in 20+ years). IRGC intel chief killed. Tehran under constant bombardment. Israel striking South Pars. 20+ healthcare facilities attacked.
attack_tempo.reasoning: Score could be 3-4 depending on whether we measure intensity against regional war standards (3) or normalized pre-conflict baseline (4). Trend clearly escalating with Trump ultimatum.

insurance_availability.notes: Gulf marine war rates spiked 5x. Hormuz described as 'effectively uninsurable.' Lloyd's says cover exists but restricted. Premiums at 1-1.5% of vessel value.
insurance_availability.reasoning: Score range reflects ambiguity between 'technically available at extreme cost' (3) vs 'practically unavailable for most operators' (4). Real uncertainty in functional availability.

navigation_integrity.notes: GNSS interference and AIS anomalies reported in JMIC updates. Military jamming likely widespread. Data is stale - no fresh JMIC update since March 19.
navigation_integrity.reasoning: High uncertainty due to data gap. Score could range from degraded (2) if interference localized, to broken (4) if systematic military jamming. Fresh intelligence needed.

bypass_capacity.notes: India sourcing 75% from non-Hormuz routes (40 nations). Saudi rerouting via Red Sea. IEA cites 3.5-5.5 mb/d bypass vs 20 mb/d normal flow. Adapters succeeding but gaps remain for gas.
bypass_capacity.reasoning: Large uncertainty range reflects partial success. Crude adapters working (score 1-2), but LNG/gas much harder (score 3). India success may not generalize to all importers.

asia_buffer_stress.notes: IEA 400M barrel emergency release cushions near-term. But medical supplies stuck in Dubai, humanitarian aid blocked for millions. Food systems under pressure.
asia_buffer_stress.reasoning: Oil buffers adequate for now (score 1-2), but humanitarian/medical supply chains breaking (score 3). Composite stress rising as conflict extends beyond 30-day horizon.

reopening.description: Hormuz reopens to normal commercial traffic within 30 days

effective_closure.description: Hormuz remains effectively closed for 30-90 days, selective Iranian transit continues
blockers: Bypass adapters working for some importers

wider_escalation.description: Conflict expands to regional infrastructure, civilian targets, or direct US-Iran confrontation

branch_model.note: Branch probabilities now include explicit uncertainty ranges reflecting model confidence and signal quality.
branch_model.methodology: Center = weighted prior. Range = plausible interval given signal gaps and model uncertainty. Ranges overlap intentionally - they are not calibrated probabilities.

modifiers.notes: Trump ultimatum for infrastructure strikes. South Pars attacked. US aircraft downed. Healthcare facilities targeted.
Pakistan mediation continues. Iran submitted 10-point proposal. But Iran rejected 45-day ceasefire, demands permanent end.
Medical supplies stuck in Dubai. Food/medicine blocked for millions. 20+ healthcare facilities attacked. Growing civilian toll.

model_evolution.change: Added uncertainty ranges to all scores and branch probabilities
model_evolution.rationale: User requested ranges indicating level of uncertainty in probability models. This replaces false precision with explicit epistemic uncertainty.
model_evolution.limitations: Ranges are heuristic, not calibrated. Overlap is intentional. Do not interpret as Bayesian credible intervals.

data_gaps: No fresh JMIC update since March 19
Iranian casualty count not updated for days
meta.next_update_priority: Fresh navigation/GNSS data, LNG flow status, Iranian domestic conditions
